title: Infinite Villages, Infinite Village Only World!
description: Makes the world villages only! Very much Infinite and supports 1.21 to 26.1.2!
body:
# 🏘️ Infinite Villages Everywhere! (Super Densely Packed)
> by BakokongHenkoloy • **Developing this Mod in Beta Development Stage**
## Turn your world into one endless, sprawling city like the congested Metro Manila City lol🥲️👌️

> This datapack overrides the default structure generation to spawn villages in **every single available chunk**.  
> No more empty plains—just an infinite ocean of houses, farms, and villagers.  
> If it's working properly when using my Datapack in your Test World.

---

## ⚙️ CRITICAL SETUP! (If you don't know how to fully utilize this)
For this datapack to work, you **MUST** set your world to **Superflat** and use the **Plains** biome. Villages cannot spawn in the default "Classic Flat" biome or in any other worlds in different kinds of preset.
If you don't want an experimental only world then don't use it!
> How ever.. if it works in like in amplified setting, spawns different types of villages depending on what biome or even in the Survival Overwold!  
> Then it worked because i tried it Amplified World Settings in 26.1.2 vanilla, not sure it yours tho!

### 1. Create New World
Select **World Type: Superflat**.

### 2. Customize the Preset
Go to **Customize -> Presets** and paste this **exact** code into the box:
`minecraft:bedrock,2*minecraft:dirt,minecraft:grass_block;minecraft:plains`

### 3. Add the Datapack
Click **Data Packs**, drag the zip file in, and ensure it is on the **Selected** (right) side!

### 4. If you're in the world and see the villages everywhere?
Then you're good and set to go! *(Beware you need a very great CPU or computer to process all of the custom natural generation!)*
But first make sure it's enabled!  
When not enabled, try running this command: `/datapack list`
If not... Then do this: `/datapack enable "file/InfiniteVillages DPv2.0_1 DATAPACK.zip"` to ensure it's working properly!

## But if it's not considered safe according to Minecraft and it doesn't work.. please report bug error here! So i could fix it properly!: [I'll make it get fixed](https://github.com/bakokonghenkoloy/Snoring-Meme-Sounds/issues/1)

> And I'll add more updates and changes to this so that it'll work for other versions like up to 1.13

---

## 🛠️ Technical Details
**Structure:** `minecraft:village_plains`  
**Separation:** 1 chunk  
**Spacing:** 2 chunks  
**Format:** Hybrid `pack.mcmeta` supporting formats 48 to 105

Heavily inspired by my thoughts lol and there's one from [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/the-infinite-village/) as a great alternative for this!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-gaWr4btOHI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Btw fully tested in 1.21.2, 1.21.7 and in 26.1.1! Confirmed it worked in all versions!  
But not sure in other versions tho! I assume it also worked!  
*(I'll make a full status of this about how compatible is this in all versions... just like my previous resource/datapack later..)*
